name: SYS 02 — ElevenLabs Post-Call Handler
description: Triggered by webhook from ElevenLabs after an outbound or inbound call. Parses and rescores post-call data, then routes by outcome: booked, callback requested, no answer, or disqualified. For each outcome, updates the HubSpot contact (and creates a deal when booked) and sends a Google Chat alert so the team can follow up. Keeps CRM and alerts in sync with voice conversations.

customPropertiesValues.value: ={{ $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.bucket.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.bucket.slice(1) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '📅 *BOOKED — Discovery Call Confirmed*

*Conversation ID:* ' + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.conversationId + '
*Rescore:* ' + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.rescoreTotal + 'pts → ' + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.bucket.toUpperCase() + '
*Tier:* ' + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.leadTier.toUpperCase() + '
*Summary:* ' + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.prospectSummary + '
*Role collected:* ' + ($('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.prospectRole || 'Not captured') + '
*Company size:* ' + ($('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.companySize || 'Not captured') + '
*Revenue range:* ' + ($('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.revenueRange || 'Not captured') + '

💼 Deal created. HubSpot updated.' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '📲 *CALLBACK REQUESTED*

*Conversation ID:* ' + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.conversationId + '
*Requested time:* ' + ($('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.callbackTime || 'Not specified') + '
*Summary:* ' + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.prospectSummary + '
*Rescore:* ' + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.rescoreTotal + 'pts

⚠️ Manual follow-up required. HubSpot updated.' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '🚫 *DISQUALIFIED / NOT INTERESTED*

*Conversation ID:* ' + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.conversationId + '
*Reason:* ' + ($('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.disqualReason || 'Not specified') + '
*Summary:* ' + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.prospectSummary + '

HubSpot updated. No further action needed.' }) }}

parameters.content:
## SYS 02 — ElevenLabs Post-Call Handler

**Webhook:** POST https://n8n.intrawebtech.com/webhook/elevenlabs-call-complete

**Call Outcomes routed:**
- 📅 booked → HubSpot update + SW Create Deal + Google Chat alert
- 📲 callback_requested → HubSpot update + Google Chat alert + Enroll SYS 02 — Outbound Lead Outreach Sequence
- 📵 no_answer → HubSpot logged + Google Chat alert + Enroll SYS 02 — Outbound Lead Outreach Sequence + SMS
- 🚫 disqualified/not_interested → IF gate → HubSpot zeroed + Google Chat alert + Log to Sheet

**Post-Call Rescore Logic:**
Uses Adam's structured data collection fields:
- company_size (Number) → employee score 0/5/10/15pts
- revenue_range (Enum) → revenue score 0-25pts
- prospect_role (String) → role score 0-20pts
Max rescore: 60pts  |  Buckets: Hot 35+, Warm 20-34, Cold <20

**Outcome overrides bucket:**
- booked or callback_requested → always Hot
- not_interested or disqualified → always Cold

**Downstream handoffs:**
- Booked → SW — Create HubSpot Deal (contactId, company, stage, tier)
- Callback/No Answer → SYS 03 webhook /enroll-outreach (contactId, firstName, company, industry)
- No Answer → SW — Send SMS (phone, body)
- Disqualified → SW — Log to Automations Log Sheet (workflowName, eventType, status, notes)

**Contact fields from ElevenLabs dynamic_variables:**
contactId, firstName, lastName, company, industry, phone, email
(Must be set when initiating the call from SYS 02 or other upstream)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contactId: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.contactId, firstName: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.firstName, company: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.company, industry: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.industry, callbackTime: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.callbackTime, prospectSummary: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.prospectSummary, bucket: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.bucket, leadTier: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.leadTier, sourceWorkflow: 'SYS 02 — ElevenLabs Post-Call Handler', eventType: 'callback_requested' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ contactId: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.contactId, firstName: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.firstName, company: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.company, industry: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.industry, conversationId: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.conversationId, bucket: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.bucket, rescoreTotal: $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.rescoreTotal, sourceWorkflow: 'SYS 02 — ElevenLabs Post-Call Handler', eventType: 'no_answer' }) }}

value.body: ={{ 'Hi ' + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.firstName + ', we tried reaching you earlier. Would love to connect — reply here or book a quick call at your convenience.' }}

workflowId.cachedResultName: SW: Log to Automations Log Sheet

value.contactName: ={{ $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.customerName || $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.firstName }}
value.notes: ={{ $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.disqualReason || 'No reason provided' }}

customPropertiesValues.value: ={{ $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.bucket.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.bucket.slice(1) }}

additionalFields.dealName: ={{ $('🔍 Parse & Rescore Post-Call Data').first().json.conversationId }} — AI Diagnostic (Call Booked)

parameters.content:
## IntraWeb — ElevenLabs Post-Call Handler

**Webhook:** POST https://n8n.intrawebtech.com/webhook/elevenlabs-call-complete

**Call Outcomes routed:**
- 📅 booked → HubSpot update + Deal created + Google Chat alert
- 📲 callback_requested → HubSpot update + Google Chat alert (manual follow-up)
- 📵 no_answer → HubSpot logged + Google Chat alert
- 🚫 not_interested / disqualified → HubSpot zeroed + Google Chat alert

**Post-Call Rescore Logic:**
Uses Adam's structured data collection fields:
- company_size (Number) → employee score 0/5/10/15pts
- revenue_range (Enum) → revenue score 0-25pts
- prospect_role (String) → role score 0-20pts
Max rescore: 60pts
Buckets: Hot 35+, Warm 20-34, Cold <20

**Outcome overrides bucket:**
- booked or callback_requested → always Hot
- not_interested or disqualified → always Cold

**⚠️ Known limitation:**
HubSpot update nodes use contactEmail field — ElevenLabs
post-call payload doesn't always include email.
You may need to look up the contact by conversationId
or phone number. Add a HubSpot search node if needed.
